description: Phase 1 production readiness: CRM enrichment, 100-call baseline, metrics

userStories.title: Set up ruff linting and fix existing violations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ruff linting to enforce code quality across the project.
acceptanceCriteria: ruff is configured in pyproject.toml (already done)
Run 'source .venv/bin/activate && ruff check src/' passes without errors
Fix all existing lint violations in src/levitan/
All 25 tests still pass
userStories.notes: Existing violations: pydantic class-based config deprecation, import ordering

userStories.title: Phone normalization for CRM enrichment
userStories.description: As a system, I need to normalize phone numbers (+7, 8, brackets, dashes) to a single format before CRM lookup.
acceptanceCriteria: Create phone normalization function in src/levitan/ or a new utils module
Handles formats: +7XXX, 8XXX, +7 (XXX) XXX-XX-XX, 8-XXX-XXX-XX-XX, 7XXX
Returns unified format: 7XXXXXXXXXX (11 digits without +)
Unit tests for 5+ phone format variants pass
All 25+ tests pass
userStories.notes: Base de contacts CSV has phones in multiple formats

userStories.title: CRM enrichment: look up contact data by phone before call
userStories.description: As an operator, I want contact info (name, region, crops) from the CSV database shown before the call starts.
acceptanceCriteria: Load all_contacts_2026.csv into a lookup structure (dict by phone)
Normalize phone before lookup
Return company name, contact person, region, crops if found
Return None/empty if phone not in database
Unit tests for lookup with 3+ test contacts pass
All tests pass
userStories.notes: CSV at data/campaigns/csv/all_contacts_2026.csv. Columns: phone, company, contact, region, crops

userStories.title: Integrate CRM enrichment into dialer_bot.py
userStories.description: As an operator, the Telegram bot should show enriched contact info before each call.
acceptanceCriteria: dialer_bot.py imports and uses the CRM enrichment module
Before each call, bot shows: company, contact name, region, crops
If contact not found, bot still proceeds with call (graceful fallback)
All tests pass
userStories.notes: Update the dialer flow to enrich card before triggering Mango callback

userStories.title: Add CRM saving: store enriched data + call results
userStories.description: As a system, CRM should store both database lookups and new data from the call.
acceptanceCriteria: After call, save: pre-call lookup data + operator notes + call recording info
Output to data/call_results/ in JSON and CSV formats
Include call timestamp, duration, operator, status
Handle missing fields gracefully (save what we have)
All tests pass

userStories.title: Fix pydantic-settings deprecation warnings in config.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove pydantic v2 deprecation warnings for class-based config.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace class Config with model_config = ConfigDict(...) in all settings classes
All 7 settings classes updated (Mango, OpenRouter, Telegram, STT, TTS, Dialog, Campaign)
Main Settings class also updated
No deprecation warnings in test output
All 25+ tests pass
userStories.notes: Warnings: PydanticDeprecatedSince20 - Support for class-based `config` is deprecated, use ConfigDict instead

userStories.title: Create 100-call campaign script and metrics baseline
userStories.description: As a project, I need to automate the 100-call baseline campaign with metrics logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Create campaign runner script that dials N contacts from CSV with operator pauses
Log: call_id, phone, duration, answer status, result status
After 100 calls, output summary: connect_rate, lead_percent, avg_duration, calls_per_hour
Summary saved to data/call_results/campaign_summary.csv
All tests pass
userStories.notes: Use existing dialer_bot.py patterns. Metrics from ROADMAP table.
